Fuzhou Tianyu Electric Co., Ltd.

Power & Distribution Transformer Solutions

Oil-immersed, dry-type, rectifier and special transformers for utility, industrial and renewable energy projects.

Get a QuoteView ProductsDownload Catalog

Quick Quote

Send transformer requirements

Share capacity, voltage, application and drawings if available. Final specifications will be confirmed by project engineering.

Product Matrix

Transformer Categories

Oil-Immersed Power Transformer

High-voltage oil-immersed transformers for substations, grid interconnection and industrial transmission.

220 kV and below

Oil-Immersed Distribution Transformer

Energy-saving distribution transformers for grid distribution and stable low-voltage output.

S20SZ20 on-load

Dry-Type Transformer

Epoxy resin cast and amorphous alloy dry-type transformers for indoor and fire-sensitive loads.

SC(B)10-18SC(B)14/18SC(B)17/19

Rectifier Transformer

Rectifier transformers for DC power systems, electrochemical processing and industrial drives.

ZBSZBSCB

Special Transformer

Project-customized oil-immersed split and phase-shifting rectifier transformer solutions.

Split transformer24-pulse phase-shifting
